payload.description: A wood-on-wood capture sound: a damped noise burst with a low thump underneath.

provenance.method: Synthesized locally by tools/make_media.py (just make-media): filtered noise burst plus 168 Hz thump and 620 Hz knock, deterministic seed.

payload.note: A real, playable local file. It was synthesized in this repo, not produced by an audio model; the deck's click-synthesis beat teaches exactly this.
